CREATE GRAPH <http://example.com/complex>; INSERT { GRAPH <http://example.com/complex> { <http://example.com/s1> <http://example.com/p1> <http://example.com/o1> . } } WHERE { ?s ?p ?o FILTER(?s = <http://example.com/s1>) };
SELECT ?s ?p ?o WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.com> { ?s ?p ?o } } ORDER BY ?s LIMIT 5;
CREATE TABLE test_data (id INTEGER, data VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, data) VALUES (1, 'Sample data 1');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, data) VALUES (2, 'Sample data 2');
SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE data LIKE 'Sample%');
SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_data);
SELECT S.s, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_data S JOIN test_data T ON S.id = T.id GROUP BY S.s HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SPARQL_REPORT('Testing the loading of TTL files.');
